description: B2 desktop's capability set. The frontend only calls this app's own #[tauri::command] handlers (which need no permission entry) plus the core defaults the webview requires — nothing more (least-privilege, crates/b2-desktop/CLAUDE.md). No plugin, filesystem, or shell permission is granted to the webview: the app reaches the vault only through the Vault façade in the Rust host, never directly from the webview. The dialog plugin is present but host-only — its native folder picker is driven from the `choose_vault` command in Rust, so the webview still cannot open a dialog itself.
